message:
feat(model): add source_repo to benchmark and repro test fixtures

Add source_repo: None to test fixtures in:
- benches/storage_perf.rs
- tests/e2e_basic_lifecycle.rs
- tests/proptest_hash.rs
- tests/proptest_validation.rs
- tests/repro_cache_crash.rs
- tests/repro_collision_labels.rs
- tests/repro_pinned_blocker.rs

This completes the source_repo field addition across all test fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
